channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘Our success with becoming… unicorns… isn't an accident – it’s the result of a 15-year bet on digital infrastructure and talent’: The story behind how Lithuania is perfectly aligned to capitalize on an emerging space economy
item.description: Lithuania is using its strong digital infrastructure and experience to become a serious player in the emerging LEO satellite economy.

item.title: A new Apple TV and HomePod mini could arrive in the fall
item.description: These refreshed devices are waiting on the debut of the revamped Siri.

item.title: Adieu l’AirTag et bonjour le FineTrack Mini 2 de Ugreen : moins cher, en promo à -29% et tout aussi efficace
item.description: Le Ugreen FineTrack Mini 2 est un petit traceur Bluetooth pour retrouver les objets auxquels il est accroché. Sur Amazon, le lot de 4 est en promo à 28,49 euros au lieu de 39,99 euros.

item.title: I've been using the Motorola Edge 70 Fusion for a month, and I don’t think the iPhone 17e or Samsung Galaxy A57 can touch it for value
item.description: The Motorola Edge 70 Fusion defies its budget price by offering a premium design, a good-looking display, and a huge battery.

item.title: I've spent 25 hours with this 8K-polling games controller: it's been great for Arc Raiders, not so great for my PC
item.description: The GameSir G7 Pro 8K increases the polling on a top-rated controller, and while the price increase is minimal, the controller's still not for everyone.

item.title: How to watch USA vs Senegal: Free Streams & TV Channels for World Cup warm-up match
item.description: All the ways to watch USA vs Senegal live streams online and from anywhere in one of the last friendlies before the 2026 World Cup gets underway.

item.title: Claude Mythos exposed a hard truth: Your enterprise patching process is way too slow
item.description: In 2024, researchers from the University of Illinois found that GPT-4, when provided with a common vulnerabilities and exposures (CVE) description, could autonomously exploit 87% of a curated 15-vulnerability one-day dataset. Without the description, it could only exploit 7%. This provided a “margin of safety” for the industry because while AI could exploit known vulnerabilities, it could not discover them. However, on April 7, Anthropic announced that Claude Mythos Preview had closed that margin, with the model autonomously discovering thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities across major operat...

item.title: Computex 2026 : comment suivre la keynote de Nvidia (et à quelle heure, du côté de Paris)
item.description: Le patron de Nvidia ouvre le bal du Computex avec une keynote très attendue, celle qui devrait officialiser les puces N1 et N1X. Voici où, quand et comment la regarder. Préparez le café : c'est tôt.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: It doesn’t matter that people hate the Ferrari Luce
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: Feeble Little Horse leans into digital weirdness on bitknot
item.description: From the opening moments of bitknot, it's obvious that Feeble Little Horse has found an entirely new gear. Where on Girl with Fish the blown-out textures were more '90s indie rock and shoegaze, on their latest LP, there's a more modern edge to the distortion and the riffs cut cleaner. Similarly, where the digital glitchiness […]

item.title: Xiaomi 17 vs Xiaomi 15 : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone premium de Xiaomi ?
item.description: Xiaomi saute une génération cette année, et passe directement du Xiaomi 15 au Xiaomi 17. Évolution dans la continuité, ou rupture radicale qui mérite toute votre attention ? On étudie la question dans notre nouveau comparatif !

item.title: United flight forced to turn around because of a Bluetooth speaker name
item.description: United flight 236 from Newark to Palma de Mallorca on Saturday night was forced to turn around just an hour after takeoff due to security concerns around a Bluetooth signal. Multiple Redditors claimed to be on the flight and reported that the crew repeatedly requested passengers to turn off their Bluetooth. According to one poster, […]

item.title: 100 tours et 44,5 km en voiture sans permis : comment suivre la course absurde de Sylvain Lyve en Citroën Ami
item.description: Neuf streameurs, des Citroën Ami débridées et 100 tours sur un vélodrome : Sylvain Lyve s'est lancé dans un défi fou ce dimanche soir sur Twitch.

item.title: Wix cuts 1,000 employees in latest AI-fueled layoff
item.description: Wix cofounder and CEO Avishai Abrahami announced on Thursday that it's laying off 20 percent of its staff.

item.title: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
item.description: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether tech CEOs are "uniquely prone to AI psychosis."

item.title: How to watch Switzerland vs Finland: FREE Live Streams & TV Channels for ice hockey IIHF World Championship 2026 Final
item.description: Watch free streams from the IIHF World Championship 2026 Final as Switzerland face Finland – ice hockey TV channels, broadcasters.

item.title: Élu meilleur hybride 2025, le Nikon Z5 II est de retour dans un pack en promo à -500 € avec un objectif 24-200 mm VR et un sac à dos
item.description: Dans ce pack Darty en promo à 2 199 euros au lieu de 2 699 euros, vous avez le boîtier Nikon Z5 II, un objectif 24-200 mm VR, un sac à dos et 2h de cours à distance Nikon School.
